page.analyze.events.sub: Upload a match video and detect goals, fouls, cards, corners and 13 other events with precise timestamps.

footer.features: AI-powered event detection · player tracking · team analytics
login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your TaqTiq AI account to continue.
register.title: Create Your Account
register.subtitle: Join TaqTiq AI and start analysing matches.
register.consent1: Videos you upload are processed by AI models and analysis results are stored in your account.
register.consent2: We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
register.consent3: You are responsible for ensuring you have the legal right to upload and analyse submitted video content.
register.nameTooShort: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
register.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.mustAccept: You must accept the Terms and Conditions to create an account.
forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.checkInbox: Check your inbox (and spam folder) for the reset link.
forgot.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
reset.title: Set new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
reset.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
reset.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
mode.title: Choose Analysis Mode
mode.events.title: Event Detection
mode.events.desc: Detect goals, fouls, cards, corners and 13 other events with timestamps.
mode.tracking.title: Tactical Tracking
mode.tracking.desc: Track every player & ball, assign teams, measure speed, distance and possession.
upload.orBrowse: or click to browse from your device
upload.clickDifferent: Click to choose a different file
upload.keepOpen: Processing takes several minutes — keep this page open until complete.
upload.clipHint: For best tracking results, use a clip 30 seconds to 1 minute long.
upload.matchHint: For best event detection, upload a match video longer than 30 minutes.
upload.guidance.tracking: Best results with a 30–60 second clip. Supports MP4, MKV, AVI, MOV, WebM — up to 2 GB.
upload.guidance.events: Full match videos work best. Supports MP4, MKV, AVI, MOV, WebM — up to 2 GB.
upload.feature.tracking.1.title: Full Player Tracking
upload.feature.tracking.1.text: Every player identified and tracked across the entire match with unique IDs.
upload.feature.tracking.2.title: Speed & Distance Stats
upload.feature.tracking.2.text: Real-time speed and total distance covered per player throughout the game.
upload.feature.tracking.3.title: Possession Analysis
upload.feature.tracking.3.text: Automatic ball possession percentages calculated for each team.
upload.feature.events.1.title: 17 Event Types
upload.feature.events.1.text: Goals, fouls, cards, corners, offsides, shots, free kicks and more — all detected automatically.
upload.feature.events.2.title: Precise Timestamps
upload.feature.events.2.text: Every event pinpointed to the exact second with confidence scores.
upload.feature.events.3.title: Team Attribution
upload.feature.events.3.text: Each event automatically assigned to the correct team based on jersey colour analysis.
progress.stage.queued.title: Queued
progress.stage.queued.desc: Your video is in the queue and will start shortly.
progress.stage.extracting.title: Analysing Video
progress.stage.extracting.desc: Reading and processing your video frames — this may take a few minutes.
progress.stage.inferring.title: Detecting Events
progress.stage.inferring.desc: Our AI is identifying goals, fouls, cards, corners and more.
progress.stage.team_colors.title: Identifying Teams
progress.stage.team_colors.desc: Detecting jersey colours and assigning team identities.
progress.stage.team_attribution.title: Attributing Events
progress.stage.team_attribution.desc: Linking each detected event to the correct team.
progress.stage.completed.title: Analysis Complete
progress.stage.completed.desc: All events detected and ready to explore.
progress.tracking.queued.title: Queued
progress.tracking.queued.desc: Your video is in the queue and will start shortly.
progress.tracking.detecting.title: Detecting Players
progress.tracking.detecting.desc: Running YOLO to locate every player, ball and referee on the pitch.
progress.tracking.processing.title: Processing Movement
progress.tracking.processing.desc: Estimating camera movement, transforming positions and calculating team assignments.
progress.tracking.rendering.title: Rendering Output
progress.tracking.rendering.desc: Drawing player annotations, overlays and generating the match report.
progress.tracking.encoding.title: Encoding Video
progress.tracking.encoding.desc: Encoding the annotated video for smooth browser playback.
progress.tracking.done.title: Tracking Complete
progress.tracking.done.desc: Your tracked video and match report are ready.
